title: 2025年度 第1回検定一次試験 英検3級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Is James at school today?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, I just saw him.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Where was he?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: In front of the science room.
questions.explanation: 「どこにいた？」に3の「理科室の前」が場所として適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ホームステイ中」→場所でなく時期。2「家のベッドで」→学校にいると言っている。3「理科室の前」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: When is your driving test?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Tomorrow. I'm getting nervous.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Don't worry. You'll pass.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「心配しないで。受かるよ」に1の「そうだといいけど」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「そうだといいけど」→正解。2「初めての車」→試験の話。3「もう終わった」→明日の話。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Where are the men's shoes?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: On the fourth floor.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm tired. I don't want to take the stairs.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「疲れた。階段は嫌だ」に2の「じゃあエレベーターを探そう」が適切。
highlights: I don't want to take the stairs
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「私もあれが好き」→無関係。2「エレベーターを探そう」→正解。3「遅くまで開いてる」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Have you visited California before?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, twice.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: How about Hawaii?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「ハワイは？」に1の「そこにも行ったことある」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「そこにも行った」→正解。2「現地で会おう」→旅行の誘いではない。3「ハガキありがとう」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Is today your last day at this school, Ms. Warner?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, Billy.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: We'll really miss you.

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: I'll come back to visit soon.
questions.explanation: 「寂しくなります」に3の「すぐ会いに戻ってくるわ」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「図書館にあった」→無関係。2「良い点取ったね」→無関係。3「すぐ会いに来る」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Did you go anywhere during the summer vacation?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, I visited my brother in Hawaii.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What does he do there?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: He knows a lot about Hawaii.
questions.explanation: 「彼はそこで何をしてる？」に1の「大学生だ」が職業・活動の答えとして適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「大学生」→正解。2「元気です」→How is he?の答え。3「ハワイに詳しい」→何をしているかの答えではない。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Have I seen you before?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: We met at a party last year.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: That's right.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「そうだった」と思い出してくれたので1の「覚えてくれて嬉しい」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「覚えてくれて嬉しい」→正解。2「それは残念」→無関係。3「会ったことないと思う」→矛盾。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Is that bike under the tree yours?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, it's Tom's.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Which bike is yours?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「あなたの自転車はどれ？」に1の「実は歩いて来た」が自然な答え。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「実は歩いて来た」→正解（自転車はない）。2「やっと見つけた」→不自然。3「いつもそこで昼食」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I need a cup of coffee.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: How about going to Bobby's Café? It has good coffee.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Is it far?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: I'm afraid I can't do it.
questions.explanation: 「遠い？」に2の「すぐそこだよ」が距離の答えとして適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「どうぞ飲んで」→距離の質問への答えではない。2「すぐそこ」→正解。3「できない」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What's your favorite animal?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I love cats.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you want to come and see my cats? They're cute.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「猫を見に来ない？」に1の「ぜひ」が自然な応答。
highlights: Do you want to come and see my cats
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ぜひ」→正解。2「もちろんそうだ」→不自然。3「ペットは飼ってない」→誘いへの応答でない。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Where are you going?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: To the cafeteria. I need to find Anna.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I just saw her outside the science room. She was talking to her sister.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Thanks.

questions.question: Who is the boy looking for?
questions.explanation: 男の子は「アンナを探さないと」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「理科の先生」→理科室の前と混同。2「姉妹」→アンナの姉妹。3「アンナ」→正解。4「アンナの姉妹」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Dad, is Grandpa still looking for his glasses?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, Lucy. He has them now. Your mother found them.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Where were they?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Beside Terry's schoolbooks.

questions.question: Who found Lucy's grandfather's glasses?
questions.explanation: 「お母さんが見つけた」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ルーシー」→質問者。2「テリー」→教科書の持ち主。3「父」→情報を伝えた人。4「母」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mom, I broke a glass in the kitchen.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Are you OK? Did you cut yourself?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, I didn't. I'm sorry about the glass. I'll go and clean it up now.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'll help you. Don't worry, Billy.

questions.question: What is the problem?
choices: Billy's mother can't buy a glass.
questions.explanation: ビリーが台所でグラスを割った。
highlights: I broke a glass in the kitchen
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「グラスを割った」→正解。2「指を切った」→切っていない。3「母が手伝えない」→手伝うと言っている。4「グラスを買えない」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mom, can you help me with my book report?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm making lunch. Ask Dad.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: He's washing the car now.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK, I'll help you after we eat.

questions.question: What does the boy ask his mother to do?
questions.explanation: 「読書感想文を手伝って」と頼んでいる。
highlights: can you help me with my book report
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「昼食を作る」→母がしていること。2「車を洗う」→父がしていること。3「本を買う」→言及なし。4「レポートを手伝う」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: How was school today?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: It was fun! We played an exciting game during P.E. class, and we read a story in English class.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sounds great.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: But I had a math exam after P.E.

questions.question: What kind of test did the girl have today?
questions.explanation: 「体育の後に数学の試験があった」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「理科」→言及なし。2「体育」→ゲームをしただけ。3「数学」→正解。4「英語」→物語を読んだだけ。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Are you OK?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, I have a stomachache.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Did you eat lunch?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, but I only had a sandwich. I'm going to go home early today.

questions.question: What is the woman's problem?
choices: She can't find the man's home.
questions.explanation: 腹痛で具合が悪い。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「サンドイッチを落とした」→言及なし。2「昼食を忘れた」→食べた。3「具合が悪い」→正解。4「男の家が見つからない」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Did you enjoy the picnic yesterday?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, but I left early.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: It was too cold. I didn't bring a jacket.

questions.question: Why did the woman leave the picnic early?
choices: She had to buy a jacket.
questions.explanation: 「寒すぎた」が早退の理由。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「寒かった」→正解。2「ジャケットを買う必要」→持ってこなかっただけ。3「忙しかった」→言及なし。4「お腹が空いた」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I love the photos in this book.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Me, too. My favorite photo is on page six.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Is that a photo of the trees?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, it's the class photo.

questions.question: What does the girl like about the book?
questions.explanation: お気に入りはクラス写真。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「クラス写真」→正解。2「絵」→言及なし。3「木の詩」→木の写真と混同。4「クラスの話」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Emma. Why are you walking to school?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: My bike is broken.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Oh, I see. How long will it take to fix it?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'll get it back on Monday.

questions.question: What is Emma's problem?
questions.explanation: 自転車が壊れている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「自転車をなくした」→壊れている。2「自転車が壊れている」→正解。3「歩けない」→歩いている。4「自転車が嫌い」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mom, I can't find my library book.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Did you look in your bag?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, but it wasn't there. I think I left it at school.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK. I'll call your teacher.

questions.question: What is the boy's problem?
choices: He forgot to do his homework.
He left his bag at school.
questions.explanation: 図書館の本が見つからない。
highlights: I can't find my library book
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「宿題を忘れた」→本の話。2「先生に電話しなかった」→母がする。3「本をなくした」→正解。4「カバンを学校に忘れた」→本を忘れた。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Greg likes winter sports. He's already good at skiing and snowboarding. This winter, he wants to try something new, so he'll take some skating lessons.

questions.question: What is Greg going to do this winter?
questions.explanation: 「スケートのレッスンを受ける」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ジャケットを買う」→言及なし。2「スキーを習う」→すでに上手い。3「スノボをする」→すでに上手い。4「スケートのレッスン」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Three weeks ago, a new art museum opened in my town. I've already been there twice. The museum has four floors, and there are paintings from all over the world.

questions.question: How many times has the man been to the art museum?
questions.explanation: 「もう2回行った」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「1回」→2回。2「2回」→正解。3「3回」→3週間前と混同。4「4回」→4フロアと混同。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Good evening, everyone. It's 5:40 now, so the museum will close in 20 minutes. The last bus from the museum to Riverhead Station will leave 10 minutes after the museum closes. Thank you.

questions.question: When does the museum close?
highlights: the museum will close in 20 minutes
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「5分後」→言及なし。2「10分後」→バスが出る時間。3「20分後」→正解。4「40分後」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm going to an Italian restaurant tomorrow. There aren't any train stations near it, and I don't have a car, so I'm going to walk there. I'll probably come home by taxi.

questions.question: How will the woman go to the restaurant?
questions.explanation: 「歩いて行く」と言っている。帰りはタクシー。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「電車」→近くに駅がない。2「車」→車がない。3「タクシー」→帰り。4「徒歩」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Max went shopping to buy a birthday present for his daughter. He wanted to give her a camera or a smartphone, but they were too expensive. He found a nice watch, so he bought her that.

questions.question: What did Max get for his daughter?
questions.explanation: 「素敵な時計を見つけて買った」。
highlights: He found a nice watch, so he bought her that
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ケーキ」→言及なし。2「カメラ」→高すぎた。3「時計」→正解。4「スマホ」→高すぎた。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mary loves animals. She had birds when she was little. Now she has a cat and a dog. But her favorite animal is a panda. She often goes to see pandas at the zoo.

questions.question: What kind of animal does Mary like the best?
questions.explanation: 「一番好きな動物はパンダ」。
highlights: her favorite animal is a panda
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「猫」→飼っている。2「鳥」→子供の頃飼っていた。3「パンダ」→正解。4「犬」→飼っている。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Ben was born in London and lived there for six years. He then moved to Sydney and lived there for twelve years. He then moved to Tokyo and has lived there for four years. He hopes to work in Boston someday.

questions.question: Where does Ben live now?
questions.explanation: 「東京に引っ越して4年住んでいる」＝現在東京在住。
highlights: moved to Tokyo and has lived there for four years
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ロンドン」→生まれた場所。2「シドニー」→以前住んでいた。3「東京」→正解。4「ボストン」→将来の希望。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: One day, I was on the train with my baby. The train was full of students and elderly people. Then, a kind tourist spoke to me and gave me his seat.

questions.question: Who helped the woman on the train?
questions.explanation: 「親切な観光客が席を譲ってくれた」。
highlights: a kind tourist spoke to me and gave me his seat
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「女の子」→言及なし。2「お年寄り」→乗っていたが助けたのは違う。3「学生」→乗っていたが助けたのは違う。4「観光客」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Last weekend, our family traveled to Riverside Valley. It was rainy when we left home, but it was cloudy when we arrived there. We enjoyed hot springs that day. The next day was sunny, so we went hiking.

questions.question: How was the weather on the second day of the boy's trip?
questions.explanation: 「翌日は晴れだった」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「雨」→出発時。2「曇り」→到着時。3「晴れ」→正解。4「雪」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Craig received a letter from his friend from his high school science club. In the letter, she invited him to her wedding. He was very happy about the invitation.

questions.question: What did Craig receive?
choices: A ticket to a science museum.
A photo of his high school.
questions.explanation: 「結婚式に招待する手紙を受け取った」。
highlights: she invited him to her wedding
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「科学館のチケット」→science clubと混同。2「写真」→言及なし。3「結婚式の招待」→正解。4「理科の本」→言及なし。
